---
title: "test_mimir_aesthetics_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_mimir_aesthetics_empire.py"
loc: 28
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.38
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 7.11
overall_score: 5.03
---

## Intent
The `test_mimir_aesthetics_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on TestMimirBeauty, warden, test_claustrophobic_code_breach, test_top_heavy_function_breach, test_structural_beauty_pass. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via TestMimirBeauty, warden, test_claustrophobic_code_breach, test_top_heavy_function_breach, test_structural_beauty_pass. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.4/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.1/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.mimir](file://src.sentinel.wardens.mimir)

### Exports
- `TestMimirBeauty`
- `warden`
- `test_claustrophobic_code_breach`
- `test_top_heavy_function_breach`
- `test_structural_beauty_pass`
